rootCause: The composting/turn-pile quest allowed a transition from the temp node into the moisture node via a process option that did not guarantee the moisture-meter requirements needed for any option on moisture. Because moisture only exposed a process action, players without the meter reached a state-locked node and could not continue or backtrack.
resolution: Added a non-blocking return option from moisture back to mix, added quest rewards, expanded quest dialogue validation to detect transitions that can enter a node without guaranteed requirements for any outgoing option so CI fails on similar state-lock regressions, and verified both reward item IDs exist in the generated inventory/process data.
